initial_entry.name: VaultGuard Sync
initial_entry.author: Peter Sedmak
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Enterprise vault security with permission-aware encrypted cloud sync. Replaces standard file sync with a system that enforces per-file permissions, end-to-end encryption, and full audit logging through an AWS backend. Works on desktop and mobile — the agent bridge (local MCP server) is desktop-only.

current_entry.name: VaultGuard Sync
current_entry.author: Peter Sedmak
current_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Permission-aware encrypted cloud sync for enterprise vaults. Enforces per-file permissions, E2E encryption, and full audit logging through AWS. Replaces standard cloud sync. Desktop + mobile supported

change_history.old_value: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Enterprise vault security with permission-aware encrypted cloud sync. Replaces standard file sync with a system that enforces per-file permissions, end-to-end encryption, and full audit logging through an AWS backend.
